features.name: queue declaration with empty queue literal
features.description: Code should include a queue declaration using the $ suffix syntax to indicate an empty queue

features.name: queue of enum type
features.description: Code should include a queue typed with an enum data type
features.snippet:
typedef enum { DDR_CMD_TYPE_PRECHARGE, DDR_CMD_TYPE_ACTIVATE, DDR_CMD_TYPE_WRITE } DDR_CMD_TYPE;
DDR_CMD_TYPE write_command_queue[$];
